name: RPlog_Meeting_With_Sinjon_Teague
title: Meeting with Sinjon Teague
summary: In the opulent Keepon Casino, the guarded Corellian operative Paul Nighman arrives under the watchful, menacing escort of a dangerous Antharian woman who berates him for being late before stalking out. Seeking a drink to steady himself, Paul falls into conversation with Sinjon Teague, a scholarly Mashi Horansi reading a handwritten Mandalorian historian's journal at the bar. As the casino's strange mirror-wall ripples with ghostly images and other patrons drift in and out, the two trade careful, philosophical talk about Mandalore, the Antharian female's baiting, and Paul's unpleasant past there. The cordial exchange ends with the courtly Horansi offering Paul his address on Caspar and a warm benediction, the two parting as wary but mutually respectful new acquaintances.
